# BP-79 positive: local cancellation ownership is passed away without visible local release
lang: go
file: BP-79-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"time"
)

func retainCancel(context.CancelFunc) {}

func Request(parent context.Context) context.Context {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(parent, time.Second)
	retainCancel(cancel)
	return ctx
}
